items.name: クロマツ　別名オマツ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Japanese Black Pine (also known as Omatsu)
en.description_en: A natural monument in the monuments category. It is village-designated by Toshima Village, with designation dated October 1, 2002. It is located in Toshima Village.
